mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO attractions (content_id, title, content_type_id, sido_code, gugun_code, first_image1, first_image2, map_level, latitude, longitude, tel, addr1, addr2, modified_time) VALUES
(#{a.contentId}, #{a.title}, #{a.contentTypeId}, #{a.sidoCode}, #{a.gugunCode}, #{a.firstImage1}, #{a.firstImage2}, #{a.mapLevel}, #{a.latitude}, #{a.longitude}, #{a.tel}, #{a.addr1}, #{a.addr2}, #{a.modifiedTime})
ON CONFLICT (content_id) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, content_type_id = EXCLUDED.content_type_id, sido_code = EXCLUDED.sido_code, gugun_code = EXCLUDED.gugun_code, first_image1 = EXCLUDED.first_image1, first_image2 = EXCLUDED.first_image2, map_level = EXCLUDED.map_level, latitude = EXCLUDED.latitude, longitude = EXCLUDED.longitude, tel = EXCLUDED.tel, addr1 = EXCLUDED.addr1, addr2 = EXCLUDED.addr2, modified_time = EXCLUDED.modified_time
